title: Basic JavaScript Array Destructuring

title: Intermediate JavaScript Array Destructuring

title: Advanced JavaScript Array Destructuring Project
description: Build a small application that applies Basic array destructuring, Rest pattern in destructuring, Default values in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

description: The following code has bugs related to Basic array destructuring. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Array Destructuring
